zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil Lewknor於1452年出生在英國素可戈林 白 澤亞時，她的父親Sir Thomas Lewknor13歲，母親Katharine Pelham12歲。她於1476年與Sir William Scott在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1529年1月14日在英國英格蘭肯特阿福德享年77歲，埋葬在英國肯特阿福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybil Lewknor于1452年出生在英国素可戈林 白 澤亞时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Lewknor13岁，母亲Katharine Pelham12岁。她于1476年与Sir William Scott在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1529年1月14日在英国英格兰肯特阿福德享年77岁，埋葬在英国肯特阿福德。

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil Lewknor was born in 1452, in Goring by Sea, Sussex, England, her father, Sir Thomas Lewknor, was 13 and her mother, Katharine Pelham, was 12. She married Sir William Scott in 1476, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 January 1529, in Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in Ashford, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybil Lewknor est née en 1452, à Goring by Sea, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Lewknor, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Katharine Pelham, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Scott en 1476, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 janvier 1529, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybil Lewknor 1452 in Goring by Sea, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Lewknor 13 und ihre Mutter Katharine Pelham 12. Sie hat 1476 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England Sir William Scott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Januar 1529 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ashford, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil Lewknor è nata il nel 1452 nel Goring by Sea, Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Lewknor, aveva 13 anni e sua madre, Katharine Pelham, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Scott nel 1476, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 gennaio 1529, nel Ashford, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Ashford, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybil Lewknorが1452年にイギリススセックスゴリング ビー セアで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Lewknorは13歳，母Katharine Pelhamは12歳であった。1476年にイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードでSir William Scottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1529年1月14日にイギリスイギリスケントアシュフォードで77歳で死去し，イギリスケントアシュフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil Lewknor(이)가 1452년 영국 수세스 고링 비 시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Lewknor(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katharine Pelham(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1476년 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 Sir William Scott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1529년 1월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.1484: de 10 de janeiro de 1484 a 9 de janeiro de 1485
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil Lewknor nasceu em 1452, em Goring by Sea, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Lewknor, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Katharine Pelham, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Scott em 1476, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de janeiro de 1529, em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil Lewknor родилась в 1452 г. в местности горинг би сеа, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Lewknor было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Katharine Pelham, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Scott в 1476 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 января 1529 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия.

Se casó con Sir William Scott en 1476, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de enero de 1529, en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra.
